prompt: Logo wordmark on pure black background. The text 'MM AGENCY.' in a single horizontal line, all uppercase. The typeface is an extremely bold, condensed, blocky custom geometric sans-serif — each letter constructed from thick rectangular blocks with sharp 90-degree corners and minimal internal counter space. Similar to Microgramma Extended Bold or Eurostile Bold Extended. All text is solid yellow (#FAFA00). The period/dot at the end is also yellow. Very tight spacing between letters. The overall style is industrial, architectural, powerful — like concrete blocks forming letters. No icon, no symbol. Pure heavy typography centered on black. Vector quality, crisp edges, completely flat.
negative_prompt: icon, symbol, graphic, shield, illustration, 3D, gradient, shadow, glow, neon, complex, busy, decorative, serif, script, handwritten, thin lines, light weight, white text, gray text, realistic photo, photography, human, blur, low quality, pixelated, noise, grunge, multiple colors
